name: Dialpad
description: Cloud communications platform providing business phone, video conferencing, and messaging services.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Dialpad admin portal at https://dialpad.com/admin
2. Go to Company Settings > API Keys
3. Generate a new API key
4. Copy the API key and paste it below

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all Dialpad users with their roles and access levels to verify employee access controls.

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Reviews admin vs non-admin user distribution and access control policies to verify RBAC implementation.

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Reviews webhook subscriptions configured in Dialpad for monitoring and alerting capabilities.
